summary: Revision 2 is not release-ready: the README states the V11 boundary accurately, but the checker does not preserve conditional host and visual ownership or cover every normative host-owned exclusion family.

artifacts.name: capability-boundary-review.json
artifacts.content: {"verdict":"fix","checkedClaims":[{"id":"bound-source-integrity","status":"pass","evidence":[{"path":"README.md","bytes":2900,"sha256":"sha256:5f1de5c6204e98559a4c118dd3d19d5fec1bc8d9179590e60293a571605b4867"},{"path":"docs/specs/v11-specialist-compiler/specialist-compiler-contract.md","bytes":36886,"sha256":"sha256:ab2c0f09a38e5de51f14c6af1c912bbc37f5ec8c27bd589273202741c94297b9"},{"path":"scripts/check-template.ps1","bytes":78340,"sha256":"sha256:43bb11d956e9879f4b501c1251b7db3468feacd90ab1b7b96ed7a5e15481b95d"},{"path":"scripts/test-check-template.ps1","bytes":93938,"sha256":"sha256:f6d4025fdbf86ffc3f02503f66290f160b2db7e9d70214ab0385bff7a41f0ed5"}]},{"id":"human-ide-semantic-decomposition","status":"pass","evidence":"README.md:7 and README.md:13-14 assign atomic decomposition to the developer and IDE and legal grouping to core; scripts/check-template.ps1:1591-1604 requires those anchors and :1642 rejects core decomposition; scripts/test-check-template.ps1:616-617 and :733-749 cover both directions."},{"id":"conditional-host-scheduling-dispatch-visual","status":"fix","evidence":"README.md:9 and :15 correctly assign approved, dependency-safe parallel execution to an external host and make it conditional. scripts/check-template.ps1:1576-1588 checks only visual path and count, while :1595 requires host dispatch without preserving conditionality; the visual tests at scripts/test-check-template.ps1:545-570 do not test ownership or conditional execution."},{"id":"positive-core-host-anchors","status":"pass","evidence":"README.md:18-19 positively assigns package, raw-handoff, and dependency-fan-in verification to core and provider/model selection, dispatch, merge, trace persistence, and memory updates to the external host. scripts/check-template.ps1:1594-1595 requires both anchors; scripts/test-check-template.ps1:760-770 and :1188-1202 remove and test each requested component."},{"id":"negative-host-capability-families","status":"fix","evidence":"scripts/check-template.ps1:1638-1648 and scripts/test-check-template.ps1:594-625 cover execution and dispatch, provider and model selection, tools, permissions, trace and event persistence, integration and merge, memory, and decomposition. They omit exclusions required by the normative contract at :455-460 for prompt, profile, executor, and credential choice; runtime capacity and launch-wave guarantees; sandbox, worktree, filesystem-boundary, workspace-isolation, and process-limit enforcement; state, prompt, result, and handoff persistence; retry, cancel, resume, and recovery; and merge-readiness decisions."}],"priorFindingDisposition":[{"finding":"human/IDE semantic decomposition ownership","disposition":"resolved","basis":"README, checker, and focused positive and negative fixtures agree with the normative ownership boundary."},{"finding":"conditional host scheduling/dispatch and visual ownership","disposition":"partially-resolved","basis":"The README is accurate, but checker and fixture protection is incomplete."},{"finding":"complete positive core-versus-host anchors","disposition":"resolved","basis":"All requested positive anchors are present and individually regression-tested."},{"finding":"focused negative regression coverage for every host-owned capability family","disposition":"unresolved","basis":"Several explicit V11 exclusion families have neither checker patterns nor failing fixtures."}],"actionableFindings":[{"id":"R2-1","severity":"release","location":"scripts/check-template.ps1:1576","finding":"Conditional external-host scheduling and visual ownership can be removed or reassigned while the checker still passes.","requiredFix":"Require active ownership-bearing visual alt text and the approved, dependency-safe, conditional host execution statement; add removal and reassignment fixtures."},{"id":"R2-2","severity":"release","location":"scripts/check-template.ps1:1638","finding":"Negative rules and fixtures do not cover every host-owned family explicitly excluded by V11.","requiredFix":"Add focused checker alternatives and one failing fixture per omitted exclusion family, including runtime supply, capacity, isolation, persistence, recovery, and merge-readiness claims."}]}

assumptions: Visual ownership was assessed from the bound README alt text and checker rules because the GIF payload is outside the declared read scope.
risks: The write-producing regression harness was not executed; test conclusions are based on static review as required.
followUps: Strengthen the checker and fixtures for conditional external-host scheduling and visual ownership.
Add negative regression coverage for every omitted V11 host-owned exclusion family.
